findings.description: SQL ID `REGSITER_ALL_USER` is missing from s4 hints. s3 includes the SQL IDs `REGISTER_USER` and `UPDATE_USER_NAME` as hints, but s4 omits the equivalent `REGSITER_ALL_USER` (the SQL_ID used in the batch registration example).
findings.source_evidence: Source: `SQL_ID:REGSITER_ALL_USER` in the SQL file for the batch update example. s3 hints include `REGISTER_USER` and `UPDATE_USER_NAME` by the same logic.
